description: {"description": "Simple, ovate leaf with an acute apex and rounded base. Prominent venation pattern, with a central midrib and pinnate secondary veins. Leaf surface appears slightly pubescent or textured."} {"description": "No visible lesions, spots, or discoloration observed on the leaf surface. No evidence of fungal fruiting bodies, bacterial ooze, or insect damage."} Uniformly green across the entire leaf surface. No localized areas of discoloration or symptom development.
